title: Enterprise Programme
description: Run a national programme: one organisation, one design, hundreds of sites.

steps.title: Your organisations
steps.description: A programme belongs to an organisation, not a person.
steps.voiceScript: An enterprise programme belongs to an organisation, not to one person. Everyone who works on it is a member of that organisation.
steps.captionText: An enterprise programme belongs to an organisation, not to one person. Everyone who works on it is a member of that organisation.
steps.fallbackMessage: Your organisations: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Switch organisation
steps.description: You may belong to several. This chooses the active one.
steps.voiceScript: If you belong to more than one organisation, this chooses which one you are acting in. Everything on the page is scoped to it.
steps.captionText: If you belong to more than one organisation, this chooses which one you are acting in. Everything on the page is scoped to it.
steps.fallbackMessage: Switch organisation: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Your programmes
steps.description: Each one carries 16 phases and 14 stage gates.
steps.voiceScript: Each programme carries sixteen lifecycle phases and fourteen stage gates. It opens at Phase 1, Concept.
steps.captionText: Each programme carries sixteen lifecycle phases and fourteen stage gates. It opens at Phase 1, Concept.
steps.fallbackMessage: Your programmes: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Register a programme
steps.description: Name it, choose its design path, name its sponsor.
steps.voiceScript: To start one, register it here. You name it, choose its design path, and name a sponsor from your own members.
steps.captionText: To start one, register it here. You name it, choose its design path, and name a sponsor from your own members.
steps.fallbackMessage: Register a programme: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: The template engine
steps.description: Templates define what every site gets.
steps.voiceScript: First, the template engine. A template defines what every site in the programme receives.
steps.captionText: First, the template engine. A template defines what every site in the programme receives.
steps.fallbackMessage: The template engine: the next screen is not reachable from here.

steps.title: Versioned, and approved
steps.description: A template is used only once approved.
steps.voiceScript: Templates are versioned. A version is drafted, submitted, and approved before any programme is allowed to build from it.
steps.captionText: Templates are versioned. A version is drafted, submitted, and approved before any programme is allowed to build from it.
steps.fallbackMessage: Versioned, and approved: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Who may do what
steps.description: Roles are granted here, and revoked here.
steps.voiceScript: Authority is granted on the members screen. The gates ask for a named role, not merely a permission.
steps.captionText: Authority is granted on the members screen. The gates ask for a named role, not merely a permission.
steps.fallbackMessage: Who may do what: the next screen is not reachable from here.

steps.title: Members and roles
steps.description: Each role is a separate, revocable row.
steps.voiceScript: Each role is a separate row you can take back. When the ministry hires a real technical director, you hand that role over and stop holding it.
steps.captionText: Each role is a separate row you can take back. When the ministry hires a real technical director, you hand that role over and stop holding it.
steps.fallbackMessage: Members and roles: not visible on this screen yet.
